title: Cozy Little Place
description: A mod that adds a few decorative blocks .
body:
Adds a few brick variants of blocks and decorative blocks with unique models.
![mini statues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f818b285fd5a6473b9893354eaea46b147734c3.png)
Adds a bunch of paintings.
![painting1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9a439ab49b75ae05cee96c43335859fdbc9a219.png)
![painting2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b1057a60096f09c74a070c640768143875c8c67.png)
